dashboard_export.description: Committed dashboard export containing parsed model predictions, explanations, model summaries, program summaries, prompts, and PolicyEngine runtime bundle metadata.

uk_transfer_dataset.artifact: enhanced_cps_2025.h5 public UK calibrated transfer artifact
uk_transfer_dataset.note: The public paper describes this as a UK calibrated transfer dataset, not native UK survey microdata or enhanced FRS.

scope.condition: No tools, no web access, one structured response per household with numeric answers and non-empty explanations.
